title: festuca ovina var. tenuifolia
intro: Festuca ovina var. tenuifolia, also known as fine-leaved sheep's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. tenuifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
